name: dev.ucp.shopping.return
title: Return Extension
description: Extends Checkout with return policy support.

return_policy.title: Return Policy
return_policy.description: Conditions, methods, timelines, and costs associated with returning physical items.

line_item_ids.description: Line items governed by this return policy, allowing distinct policies per item.

return_days.description: Length of the merchant's return window in days, measured from the date of delivery. This is a policy statement — it communicates the window duration, not a pre-computed deadline.

exchanges_allowed.description: Indicates whether the buyer can exchange the item.

methods.description: Permitted physical methods for returning the item, along with their associated fee structures.

return_method.title: Return Method
return_method.description: The physical method through which the buyer can return the item.

type.description: Physical return channel. Clients MUST tolerate unknown values. Well-known values: `in_store` (buyer returns at a retail location), `by_mail` (buyer ships item back via carrier), `kiosk` (buyer drops off at a self-service kiosk or designated drop point).

fee.description: The cost structure associated with this specific return method.

return_fee.title: Return Fee
return_fee.description: The cost structure associated with a specific return method.

type.description: Cost structure for this return method. Clients MUST tolerate unknown values. Well-known values: `free` (merchant covers return costs), `fixed_fee` (flat fee charged, see amount), `customer_responsibility` (buyer arranges and pays for return shipping).

amount.description: Fixed return fee charged by the merchant, represented in minor currency units (e.g., cents). Required if type is fixed_fee.

display_text.description: Human-readable text to display against the fee to provide context to the buyer (e.g., 'Restocking Fee', 'Return Shipping Label').

return_policies.description: Return policies applicable to items in the checkout.
